creator: mvh@netcom.com
text:
if you do a make clean, it gets stuck in /usr/ports/japanese/mew-mule:

netcom1# make clean
===>  Cleaning for mule-2.3
===>  Cleaning for gmake-3.76.1
===>  Cleaning for mule-common-2.3
===>  Cleaning for gmake-3.76.1
===>  Cleaning for mew-common-1.92.4
===>  Cleaning for emacs-19.34b
===>  Cleaning for gmake-3.76.1
===>  Cleaning for mew-common-1.92.4
===>  Cleaning for emacs-19.34b
===>  Cleaning for gmake-3.76.1
===>  Cleaning for mew-common-1.92.4
===>  Cleaning for emacs-19.34b
===>  Cleaning for gmake-3.76.1
===>  Cleaning for mew-common-1.92.4
===>  Cleaning for emacs-19.34b
===>  Cleaning for gmake-3.76.1
===>  Cleaning for mew-common-1.92.4

and so on

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/japanese/mew-mule

make clean

or

make clean

from /usr/ports
